title: Vibrant Lovely Pink Paper Party Bags (25cm x 13cm) 12 Count - Perfect for Celebrations and Events
features: • Pack of 12 Paper Baby Pink Party Bags
• Baby Pink Paper Party Bags measure approximately 25cm x 13cm x 9cm (10" x 5" x 3.5")
• Ideal for a girls birthday party, girl baby shower, Valentines party, bridal shower, Easter party or other special occasion
• Fill with sweets, cake or party bag fillers to thank guests for attending your celebration
• Coordinate with other baby pink party supplies and party decorations from Unique Party
